name: Sunset boat trip across the harbour of Maó
description: A private sunset trip across the natural harbour of Maó, one of the largest in the Mediterranean, with a glass of cava and the city lighting up in the distance. A serene way to see the island from the water, a step from the centre.

highlights: taking in the great harbour of Maó in the warm light of dusk
a toast with cava and cold drinks on board
a central departure from Cala Figuera, with no need for a car
